question: Find the name of all the services which either have been used by customer "Hardy Kutch" or have been rated as "good" in one of the customer interactions.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Services.Service_Details FROM Services JOIN Customers_and_Services ON Services.Service_ID = Customers_and_Services.Service_ID WHERE Customers_and_Services.Customer_ID = (SELECT Customers.Customer_ID FROM Customers WHERE Customers.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch') UNION SELECT DISTINCT Services.Service_Details FROM Services JOIN Customer_Interactions ON Services.Service_ID = Customer_Interactions.Service_ID WHERE Customer_Interactions.Status_Code = 'good'

back_translation.intent: 获取特定客户关联的所有服务详情

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取所有被客户'Hardy Kutch'使用或在客户互动中被评价为'good'的服务名称，但反向翻译的描述仅提到获取'Hardy Kutch'关联的服务详情，未明确包含'rated as good'的条件，也未明确目标列是服务名称。
